title: Red Bull Air Race Vienna
description: One of the most spectacular races along the Danube riverfront, with thousands of spectators lining the banks.

title: Lausitzring Speed Challenge
description: High-speed aerial acrobatics above the legendary motorsport venue in Lusatia.

title: Porto Atlantic Race
description: Low-level racing over the stunning Atlantic coastline with dramatic ocean backdrops.

title: Budapest Grand Prix Air
description: Racing through the iconic skyline of Budapest, combining speed and heritage.

title: Nice Côte d'Azur Invitational
description: Elegant racing above the French Riviera, a fan favourite for its scenic Mediterranean setting.

title: Gdańsk Baltic Open
description: Northern Europe's premier air race, staged over the historic amber coast of the Baltic Sea.

title: Zagreb Adriatic Cup
description: A thrilling circuit over Croatia's capital, drawing competitors from across the Balkans.

title: Thessaloniki Aegean Race
description: Mediterranean racing at its finest, with the Aegean Sea as a stunning natural backdrop.

title: Prague Vltava Classic
description: Historic city-centre race above the Vltava river, looping around Prague Castle.

title: Marseille Mistral Challenge
description: Wind and speed collide in this demanding coastal circuit above the Calanques National Park.

title: Munich Alps Sprint
description: Alpine scenery frames this compact but intense sprint circuit above Bavaria's capital.

title: Dubrovnik Pearl Race
description: Breathtaking circuits above the walled old city, with the Adriatic sparkling below.
